textByHashes.cf0611e6c56bb58aede950458f21595ac32caa5d: Oh, er, hello. What do you want?
textByHashes.3b1a92014091647377d098bfa3fe030cbe33ee56: There's not much farming land around here. Only that little patch outside.
textByHashes.5ed434884f93b77849f54aafc7b83249d0c69646: Like I said, I only know about cactuses...
textByHashes.51e6ad2271636b981c00b19459005c38fb527365: First you have to weed the patch using a rake.
textByHashes.4dafa9354be3da20bec334270524af74b86595ff: Not really. I've not done much farming recently.
textByHashes.107e7a1157db7a0fa6afa67ec6078c7676cb192c: Sorry. They haven't been delivered yet.
textByHashes.968d216d61459543591be8adfbe4fc40c953de12: I'm going to set up a shop selling farming implements. That patch out there may be small, but it's all we've got.
textByHashes.52a738d9b4716d60a7a09dabd84ec3f37a776891: Yes, he bought these tents and had them put up for us. He says he'll also get our goods in so we can start selling them soon.
textByHashes.21e752b0de3cc27fcc0f41fef8fe968d3d244660: I only know how to farm cactuses, so this spot is perfect.
textByHashes.180ea105ef5e91cf8e29fa2474f0fc96cda6b6b5: Of course. He's always happy to talk to possible business partners.
textByHashes.24a499c5744eb87bddeb594cd00e02facb0c273d: Now why would you think that?
textByHashes.cde1a9930f9bfc10cd97021389e1ccd35fc5baaa: Those people just don't want us to succeed. Don't listen to them!
